name: Reuben Casserole
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:15
1. Spread sauerkraut in a 13- x 9- x 2-inch baking dish.
2. Arrange tomato slices on top; spread with dressing and dot with butter.
3. Cover with corned beef and cheese.
4. Separate each biscuit into 3 thin layers; arrange over casserole.
5. Sprinkle with cracker crumbs and caraway seeds.
6. Bake at 425 degrees for 10 minutes or until the biscuits are golden. Yield: 6 servings.
